headline: Doing hard things in public.
tagline: Weight loss. Mental health. Discipline. Documenting the journey — honestly.
story: I'm James. From Morley, West Yorkshire. Gambling addict from age nine. I've been through it — smoking, alcohol, substances. I did two years sober before drinking again but i decided to stop on january 1st 2026 and now i'm stopping smoking and weed too. I was a Slimming World Man of the Year finalist. I failed 75 Hard by not taking a daily photo. Now I'm going again — and filming every day of it.

pillars.title: Men's health & weight loss
pillars.body: Slimming World. 75 Hard. Real results, no filters.

pillars.title: Mental health
pillars.body: Addiction, sobriety and what it actually feels like.

pillars.title: Discipline & doing hard things
pillars.body: What happens when you show up every day anyway.
